articles.title: Late-night Delhi huddle: Eknath Shinde meets 6 Shiv Sena (UBT) MPs amid 'Operation Tiger' buzz
articles.summary: Speculation of a Shiv Sena (UBT) split intensified after Eknath Shinde met with several MPs from Uddhav Thackeray's camp in Delhi. In response, Shiv Sena MP Arvind Sawant urged the Lok Sabha Speaker not to recognize any breakaway group or merger, citing parliamentary rules and the ongoing Supreme Court case..

articles.title: UGC NET June exam admit card 2026 released at ugcnet.nta.nic.in for June 22 to 30 exams: Check direct link to download hall tickets here
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency has issued admit cards for the UGC NET June 2026 examination scheduled across six days later this month. Candidates can access their hall tickets online and are advised to verify all details carefully.

articles.title: IPU to conduct MEd counselling on June 18; Merit-based seat allotment on same day: Check details here
articles.summary: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University will conduct the first offline counselling for M.Ed admissions on June 18 at its Dwarka campus. Qualified candidates will undergo document verification followed by merit-based seat allotment.

articles.title: SGPGI Nursing Officer admit card 2026 released at sgpgims.org.in: Direct link to download hall tickets here
articles.summary: The SGPGI Nursing Officer recruitment process has entered its final stage with the release of the city intimation slip and the admit card expected shortly before the examination. Candidates scheduled to appear for the computer-based test between June 19 and 23 should verify their details carefully, follow official instructions, and stay updated through the institute’s website..

articles.title: Gujarat TAT HS result 2026 released at sebexam.org: Direct link to download here
articles.summary: The Gujarat State Examination Board has announced the TAT-HS 2025 Preliminary Examination results after completing a transparent evaluation process that included OMR sheet publication and answer key objections. Of the 1.65 lakh registered candidates, 1.47 lakh appeared for the test.
